Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. CERN to host a new phase of Open Research Europe 203 upvotes, 17 comments
  2. Whistler: Live eBPF Programming from the Common Lisp REPL 41 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Show HN: Fio: 3D World editor/game engine – inspired by Radiant and Hammer 45 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. OpenTelemetry profiles enters public alpha 153 upvotes, 20 comments
  5. Why so many control rooms were seafoam green (2025) 652 upvotes, 136 comments
  6. Order Granting Preliminary Injunction – Anthropic vs. U.S. Department of War [pdf] 117 upvotes, 18 comments
  7. Show HN: Turbolite – a SQLite VFS serving sub-250ms cold JOIN queries from S3 120 upvotes, 28 comments
  8. Show HN: Veil – Dark mode PDFs without destroying images, runs in the browser 49 upvotes, 9 comments
  9. John Bradley, author of xv, has died 236 upvotes, 70 comments
  10. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 872 upvotes, 301 comments
  11. DOOM Over DNS 228 upvotes, 73 comments
  12. $500 GPU outperforms Claude Sonnet on coding benchmarks 109 upvotes, 37 comments
  13. My minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack 316 upvotes, 129 comments
  14. Show HN: I put an AI agent on a $7/month VPS with IRC as its transport layer 140 upvotes, 53 comments
  15. Chroma Context-1: Training a Self-Editing Search Agent 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  16. HyperAgents: Self-referential self-improving agents 147 upvotes, 57 comments
  17. Generators in Lone Lisp 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Moving from GitHub to Codeberg, for lazy people 547 upvotes, 274 comments
  19. Dobase – Your workspace, your server 33 upvotes, 10 comments
  20. Agent-to-Agent Pair Programming 18 upvotes, 4 comments
  21. Chicago artist creates tourism posters for city's neighborhoods 66 upvotes, 30 comments
  22. Judge blocks Pentagon effort to 'punish' Anthropic with supply chain risk label 280 upvotes, 164 comments
  23. From 0% to 36% on Day 1 of ARC-AGI-3 38 upvotes, 15 comments
  24. Using FireWire on a Raspberry Pi 63 upvotes, 29 comments
  25. HandyMKV for MakeMKV and HandBrake Automation 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. Colibri – chat platform built on the AT Protocol for communities big and small 108 upvotes, 65 comments
  27. We haven't seen the worst of what gambling and prediction markets will do 619 upvotes, 449 comments
  28. Anthropic Subprocessor Changes 52 upvotes, 30 comments
  29. Apple discontinues the Mac Pro 175 upvotes, 151 comments
  30. We rewrote JSONata with AI in a day, saved $500k/year 74 upvotes, 74 comments

Last generated 12:00pm, 27 March 2026. Source here.
